_comment: Perp-symbol -> CoinGecko id overrides. Some venues list a perp under a ticker that differs from the token's CoinGecko symbol, or under a ticker that COLLIDES with an unrelated coin (e.g. VELODROME's token symbol is VELO, which also belongs to 'Velo Protocol'). Resolving by symbol alone would attach the wrong project/price/dumps. Each entry below is a verified perp -> exact CoinGecko id so the watchlist shows the SAME token across venues. id-based, not symbol-based, to dodge ticker collisions. Verified live (detector.enrich.cg_id_for is mapping-first). Add an entry as `"PERPSYMBOL": "coingecko-id"`.
